name: dingtalk_send_message
description: Send text or markdown message to a DingTalk group via robot webhook. Supports keyword security and sign verification. Returns send result.
description_zh: 通过钉钉机器人Webhook推送消息到群聊，支持文本和Markdown格式

webhook_url.description: Full webhook URL from DingTalk robot, e.g. https://oapi.dingtalk.com/robot/send?access_token=xxx

content.description: Message content. For text type: plain text string. For markdown type: markdown formatted string with title on first line.

title.description: Message title (required for markdown type, optional for text)

at_mobiles.description: List of phone numbers to @mention, e.g. ['138xxxx', '139xxxx']

at_all.description: Whether to @all members in the group
